messages.content:
**Squad Coordinator** here. I route work to the right team member for the **Deckpilot** VS Code extension.

**Team:**
| Agent | Role |
|-------|------|
| Cervantes | Lead — architecture, scope, code review |
| De Vega | Frontend — webview, CSS, slide rendering |
| De Unamuno | Backend — automation, video, action executors |
| Cercas | Screen recording — ffmpeg, window detection |
| Delibes | Testing — QA, edge cases, coverage |
| Scribe | Session logging |

Just tell me what you need and I'll route it to the right person (or handle it directly if it's a quick question).
